mundo.titulo: Water safety warning after nine people die during heatwave
mundo.resumen: Charities urge people to take precautions after at least nine people died after getting into difficulty in water during the warm weather.

mundo.titulo: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
mundo.resumen: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

mundo.titulo: Resident doctors to strike for 16th time over pay
mundo.resumen: British Medical Association resident doctor members in England announce new strike for four days from 15 June.

mundo.titulo: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
mundo.resumen: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.

mundo.titulo: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
mundo.resumen: The ex-Labour PM says Sir Keir Starmer's government is in the "wrong position" ahead of the next election.

mundo.titulo: Student loans inquiry finds many did not understand terms
mundo.resumen: The Treasury inquiry is looking at student loan plans in England and whether repayment terms are "reasonable".

negocios.titulo: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
negocios.resumen: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

negocios.titulo: What will the energy cap changes mean for my bills?
negocios.resumen: Typical annual household bills will rise by 13% when the new energy cap takes effect on 1 July.

negocios.titulo: 'Bullying' and 'overbearing' behaviour behind abrupt BP chairman removal
negocios.resumen: BP declined to comment on whether bullying behaviour was part of the reason for his immediate dismissal.

negocios.titulo: Booming AI chip demand helps create two new $1tn club members
negocios.resumen: SK Hynix and Micron are the latest tech firms to join the growing list of stocks with mega valuations.

negocios.titulo: Ferrari shares slump after it unveils first fully electric car
negocios.resumen: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

negocios.titulo: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
negocios.resumen: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

tecnologia.titulo: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
tecnologia.resumen: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.

tecnologia.titulo: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
tecnologia.resumen: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track

tecnologia.titulo: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
tecnologia.resumen: With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.

tecnologia.titulo: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
tecnologia.resumen: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.

tecnologia.titulo: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
tecnologia.resumen: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.

tecnologia.titulo: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
tecnologia.resumen: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

tecnologia.titulo: This smart bird feeder captures more of my backyard drama
tecnologia.resumen: Since moving to South Carolina's Lowcountry, I've been spellbound by the myriad of beautiful birds that share the coast with us - ospreys raising their babies in towering nests beside the road to my daughter's school, roseate spoonbills wading in the marsh on my morning walks, eagles circling over my son's tennis matches, and a […]

tecnologia.titulo: This Ferrari should have been a Volkswagen

Whether they own a Ferrari or just have a poster of a Testarossa on their wall, fans in the Ferrari-verse are frothy about the Luce, the company's first all-electric vehicle. tecnologia.titulo: 007 First Light is like a James Bond movie in the best way possible
tecnologia.resumen: The James Bond franchise is nothing if not a spectacle: Aside from the explosions and gun fights, even its calmer moments are dripping in the pomp and glamour of elite ostentation and luxury locales. tecnologia.titulo: Win cool gadgets we can’t keep because The Verge has ethics
tecnologia.resumen: When people learn I work for The Verge, they inevitably ask: “Do you get to keep the gadgets?” Now that I film Today I’m Toying With, a video series where I share the joy of tech, I get that question more than ever. The answer is no, we don’t keep them! Our ethics policy is […]

tecnologia.titulo: The best part of Mina the Hollower is how it randomizes the Zelda formula
tecnologia.resumen: After rolling credits on Mina the Hollower, I did something unusual for me and immediately started a new file. I'm not typically one to replay games right after I beat them. tecnologia.titulo: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
tecnologia.resumen: In the wake of Google expanding its AI verification efforts at I/O, YouTube is now finally going to start taking AI labeling seriously. YouTube has announced that it's relocating AI disclosures on Shorts and long-form videos to make them easier to spot and will start automatically identifying and labeling AI-generated content on the platform.
